title: Senior Doctor - Tata Memorial Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Tata Memorial Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!
